name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at what came through the clinic yesterday. A few new patients reached out, some appointments got booked, and the team kept things moving — nothing that needs your attention right this second.

Just wanted you to have the picture before chairs start filling up. Have a smooth one.

— Bright Smile Dental
